Chord Diagram Between Two Categorical Variables

PlotChord.Rd

Draws a chord diagram showing the connectivity between two metadata variables (e.g. cell-type assignment and sample). Each arc represents the number of cells shared between a level of var1 and a level of var2. Uses circlize.

Because circlize draws to the active graphics device (base R graphics), this function returns the contingency matrix invisibly rather than a ggplot2 object.

When facet.by is supplied, chord diagrams are arranged side-by-side in a grid on a single PDF page using par(fig = ..., new = TRUE). The PDF width/height scale automatically with the number of panels. The filename includes "by_{facet.by}".

canvas_padding expands the circlize canvas so long sector labels are never clipped - increase it if you still see clipping.

Usage

PlotChord(
  data,
  var1,
  var2,
  donor.by = NULL,
  facet.by = NULL,
  ncol_facet = NULL,
  canvas_padding = 0.3,
  var1_colors = NULL,
  var2_colors = NULL,
  alpha = 0.8,
  label_cex = 0.8,
  directional = FALSE,
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  pdf_width = 7,
  pdf_height = 7
)

Arguments

data

A Seurat object or a plain data.frame/tibble.

var1

Character. First variable (e.g. "BraakStage"). Sectors for var1 levels appear first in the diagram.

var2

Character. Second variable (e.g. "ThalPhase").

donor.by

Character or NULL. Column identifying the donor / patient. When supplied, metadata is deduplicated to one row per donor so arc widths reflect donor counts - the right choice for any patient-level pathological or clinical variable. Default NULL.

facet.by

Character or NULL. Metadata column to facet by - one chord diagram per level, arranged side-by-side in a grid. Default NULL.

ncol_facet

Integer or NULL. Number of columns in the chord grid when facet.by is used. Auto-computed (max 3) if NULL.

canvas_padding

Numeric. Extra space added around the chord circle (in canvas units) to prevent sector labels from being clipped. The canvas runs from -1 - padding to 1 + padding on each axis. Default 0.3. Increase to e.g. 0.5 for very long labels.

var1_colors

Named character vector for var1 levels. Auto-assigned if NULL.

var2_colors

Named character vector for var2 levels. Auto-assigned if NULL.

alpha

Numeric. Chord fill opacity (0-1). Default 0.8.

label_cex

Numeric. Sector label font size multiplier. Default 0.8.

directional

Logical. Draw directional arrows from var1 to var2. Default FALSE.

output_dir

Directory to save a PDF. NULL = no save.

object_name

Label prefix for the output filename.

pdf_width, pdf_height

PDF dimensions per panel in inches. Total PDF width = pdf_width × ncol; total height = pdf_height × nrow. Default 7 x 7.

Value

The contingency matrix, or a named list of matrices when facet.by is used (invisibly).
